item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I agree that not liking your job would be enough to drive someone into a pure God Complex that quickly, but if you pay attention do what the conversation held, he also was probably single, probably lived alone, and felt his life was going nowhere, and he had no idea how to fix it. He probably was a giant asshole before this, but it seems like he was painfully unhappy with his life, what with the mention of his friend hugging his kids.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
power can really get to people's heads huh!

i enjoyed this a lot! especially the VHS logs, those were really entertaining.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is really fun, it feels like Rimworld turned into an SCP. On that note though, I kinda wish that the gamey-ness of it was fleshed out a bit more. My favorite part was definitely the person that got designated as food, but I wish there was more of that kind of thing going on with this. I also find the characterization of the player a bit strange. I can’t tell if he is just a complete asshole before this that develops a god complex the instant he got power or if the anomaly caused this in him. Not liking his job just doesn’t feel like strong enough motivation for him to become this much of a monster.

Overall though I thoroughly enjoyed it, and it makes me very excited for more Arcadia stuff. +1

item.title: Re: Author Post (Tanhony)
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Author Post (Tanhony)
item.content:encoded:
Hi everyone! This is a collab between myself and Roget. I really hope you enjoy it!

Thanks to Rounderhouse and JackalRelated for their feedback!
